chunks.text: Salto the wall-jumping robot is the most vertically agile ever built - EECS at Berkeley EECS Prof. Ronald Fearing, EECS PhD student Justin Yim, post doc Dr. Mark Plecnik, and ME PhD student Duncan Haldane have created Salto, the most v ertically agile jumping robot. Salto can repeatedly jump 1 meter vertically at almost two times per second. Salto is featured in the premier issue of Science Robotics (Dec. 6).
